title: uiinpui's Enchantments (legacy version)
description: A collection of enchantments that I wanted to make because I was bored and wanted to learn how making datapacks works :>
body:
A minecraft Datapack that adds about 30 new enchantments and a couple structures covering multiple different aspects of survival! Much recommended to play with a datapack/mod that removes the "Too Expensive" thing from anvils because without it you won't be able to get max gear. I personally recommend [Anvil Never Too Expensive by tinytransfem.](https://modrinth.com/mod/ante/versions)

**This datapack will no longer be updated. If you want a newer version of this pack, go to [the new version of the datapack.](https://modrinth.com/datapack/uiinpuis-enchantments-new)**

<details>
<summary>Current Features:</summary>
  
- Big Hands: Gain +0.5 extra reach per level on blocks for easier building. Has 5 levels and works on chestplates.
  
- Hasty Hits: Gain 10% more attack speed on sharp tools (like swords and axes) per level of this enchantment. Has 3 levels.

- Curse of Heaviness: Boots with this enchantment are heavier than usual, causing gravity to be 10% stronger for each level. Has 3 levels. You also take less knockback.

- Curse of Breaking: Any item that can be enchanted with Unbreaking has a chance of having this curse. It causes the item to break twice as quickly and is incompatible with Unbreaking. Has one level.

- Disappearance: Below light level 3, gain the invisibility potion effect. Works on helmets and has one level.

- Desert Runner: An enchantment that does do the same as soul speed that can be found on boots, but on sand instead. Just like soul speed this enchantment has 3 levels. If you're wondering, this enchantment is compatible with soul speed. Not very balanced but it's just more fun that way.

- Healthy: You can find armor with this enchantment that will give you an extra heart when equipped. Has one level.

- Bee's Sting: Enchanting a sword in an enchantment table or putting a book with this enchantment on another sharp tool without fire aspect will poison anything you hit. Has 3 levels. Just bee warned, it's not without cost...

- Curse of Channeling: Bows with this curse will sometimes be struck by lightning when you shoot them (as long as a thunderstorm is going on). Note that you will be struck by lightning, not the arrow.

- Bedrock Plating: Putting this on leggings will give you a small chance to get the resistance effect for a short time when hit.

- Weakening: Basically Bedrock Plating but the attacker gets the weakness effect instead of the victim getting resistance. In a balanced datapack I'd make these mutually exclusive, but balancing is lame.

- Snow Speed: When on top of snow you become faster. The snow needs to be at least 6 layers high. (It's literally just soul speed again again). Only found in igloos. Once again compatible with the other speed enchantments.

- Ender Heart: A rare enchantment found in end cities which when put on an elytra gives you the regeneration effect. If you get level 2 of this enchantment you will also get an extra heart.
  
- Strong Legs: An enchantment for leggings with 4 levels where each level allows you to fall one more block without taking fall damage.
  
- Reach: An enchantment for swords and axes. It gives you more attack range.

- Heart of Oak: A shield enchantment that gives you the absorption potion effect passively (it's really broken but screw balancing lol). This enchantment is found in jungle pyramids.

- Last Attack: Another shield enchantment that has a small chance to give you the strength potion effect upon being hit. This enchantment is found in jungle pyramids.

- Vitamin D: ANOTHER shield enchantment that passively regenerates your shield when you can see the sky. This enchantment is found in jungle pyramids.

- Far Fall: A mace enchantment that gives the mace more attack range and reduces your gravity. It's found in trial chamber pots.

- Curse of Hunger: Wearing an armor piece with this curse gives you the hunger potion effect.
  
- Shotgun: Turns the bow into a shotgun, allowing you to shoot many arrows at once. 1 more arrow per enchantment level, to be more specific. The enchantment has 6 levels, so 7 arrows in total. This enchantment also changes the way your bow takes durability damage.

- Root: Mend 1 durability on armor pieces per second per level when standing on dirt-like blocks, found in the rooted logs structure.

- Treasure Finder: Find random items when mining stone with this pickaxe enchantment, each level has a better loot table than the last. You might even find some enchanted books! Incompatible with silk touch and drops do not increase when fortune is added to it, but it is compatible with fortune. It's found with abandoned mineshaft loot.

- Exoskeleton: Gives extra armor toughness on every armor piece.

- Plate piercing: Basically breach but slightly worse and for swords. Has 5 levels.

- Blazing: An enchantment for netherite pickaxes (yes, only netherite) that makes (deepslate) iron/gold ore and ancient debris drop their smelted form. Works with fortune, but is incompatible with silk touch. It's found in fortress chests.

- Shellsplosion: Allows shulkers to drop from 0-2 shells, while still being able to get the bonus looting chance, goes on swords just like looting. It's found in end city loot.

- Voiding: Commonly found underground blocks will be "voided" when mined with a pickaxe enchanted with this enchantment. Found on top of the voided island.
<details>
<summary>Voiding Block List</summary>

- Andesite
- Diorite
- Granite
- Stone
- Tuff
- Deepslate
- Netherrack
- Blackstone
- Basalt

Side note: I intentionally didn't include End Stone because this enchantment is more for convenience when mining and you don't really need to mine in the end.

Side note 2: This enchantment is designed to be on a backup pickaxe, not on your main pickaxe. That's why blocks like basalt and blackstone are also there. It's mainly designed to carve out large areas or to not pick up common blocks during mining.
</details>

Other Features:

- Structures:

  - Rooted Logs: A small structure found in mesas that houses the Root enchantment.

  - Voided Island: An island found near the small end islands floating around with some end rods and a shulker with fireworks. Nice to stop by to continue to fly!

</details>

I hope you enjoy these enchantments!
